reviews.review_description:
Graphics are okay.
Wander first 2 - 3 rooms pulling levers and never got any further when the levelers I found did nothing. Gave up. Hint system told me to pull them then nothing happened. Bugged. Can’t progress.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! Some of the levers are intentionally misleading opening doors that are not needed, there are more hidden.

reviews.review_description: This escape game’s graphics were such that it was a bit scary and immersive but there is nothing terrifying in it and overall a unique and interesting puzzle experience once. Very good at the current price as well. Very satisfying once I finally completed and escaped the castle and dungeon
I like horror games. I recommend this app.
Kinda like the mRNA COVID vaccination
